commands.review_summary:
The branch changes approval action views into decision and command variants and updates the approval reaction runtime test to remove the prior cast workaround.

PR surface: Source +10, Tests -12. Total -2 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main reads action.kind and handles command-only actions in the approval reaction runtime, while ApprovalActionView does not type a kind or command-only variant; the focused reproduction is the declaration/typecheck path named in the PR body.
